title: Instances
description: Manage the Cockpit CLI machines signed in to this account.

empty.title: No instances yet
empty.description: Sign in from cockpit-cli on a machine to register it here.

rename.title: Rename instance
rename.description: Choose a display name that is easy to recognize.
rename.label: Display name
rename.error: Couldn't rename that instance. Try again.

revoke.title: Revoke instance
revoke.description: This signs {{name}} out remotely and prevents it from minting relay tokens.
revoke.typePrompt: Type the instance name to confirm:
revoke.error: Couldn't revoke that instance. Try again.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.readyDescription: Start a live shell on this instance through the relay.
terminal.stepUpNotice: Because your account has 2FA enabled, opening a terminal requires recent reauthentication.
terminal.offlineDescription: The daemon is not connected to the relay right now. Start cockpit-cli on that machine and try again.
terminal.revokedDescription: Revoked instances cannot open remote terminals.
terminal.notFoundDescription: This instance does not exist or you no longer have access to it.
terminal.stepUpDescription: Enter your password and 2FA code to open a remote shell.
terminal.recordingNotice: This terminal may be recorded by the instance owner or organization policy.

errors.bad_frame: The terminal host sent an invalid frame.
errors.scope_denied: Terminal access is not permitted for this account.
errors.image_too_large: That image is too large to paste.
errors.unsupported_file: Only image files can be pasted into the terminal.
errors.host_error: The terminal host reported an error.

remote.projectsDescription: Browse daemon projects and open remote sessions.
remote.offlineBanner: The instance is offline or reconnecting. Last in-memory state remains visible.
remote.noProjectsDescription: Start or connect the daemon, then refresh this page.
remote.newSessionDescription: Create a browser-controlled session in this project.
remote.composerPlaceholder: Message the agent. Use Ctrl+Enter to send.
remote.selectSession: Select a session from the sidebar.
remote.noSessions: No sessions in this project yet.

sharing.title: Sharing for {{name}}
sharing.description: Invite collaborators, review grant status, and revoke access immediately.
sharing.addGrantDescription: Grant explicit access by email. The recipient must accept before access is active.
sharing.projectRootHint: Terminal grants are always instance-wide. Leave blank to allow every project for other scopes.

scopeDescriptions.terminal: Full remote shell access to this machine. High risk.
scopeDescriptions.agent: Create and participate in agent sessions for the selected project root.
scopeDescriptions.agent_readonly: View shared agent sessions without sending messages or resolving approvals.
scopeDescriptions.project_files: Browse and edit files allowed by daemon policy for the selected project root.

sharing.terminalWarning: Terminal access is high risk and defaults to a 7 day expiry. Revoke it as soon as the collaborator no longer needs it.
sharing.inviteSaved: Invitation saved, but email delivery is not configured.
sharing.grantsDescription: Each row is one scope for one collaborator and project root.
sharing.noGrants: No collaborators have been invited yet.
sharing.revokeDescription: This immediately disconnects {{email}} from this instance and invalidates their next relay token.
sharing.revokeTypePrompt: Type the collaborator email to confirm:
sharing.auditDescription: Grant lifecycle events and remote action audit rows for this instance.
sharing.pendingDescription: Accept invitations sent to this email address before using shared instances.
sharing.sharedWithMeDescription: Instances other users have explicitly shared with this account.
sharing.terminalConfirmHint: Type {{email}} to enable terminal access for this invite.
sharing.twoFactorRequired: Enable two-factor authentication before granting terminal access.

files.title: Files
files.selectFile: Select a file to preview or edit.
files.truncatedDirectory: This directory is truncated. Narrow the path or hide ignored entries.
files.truncatedFile: This file is truncated. Copy the buffer before making large edits.
files.binaryState: Binary or unsupported file. Editing and download are not available in this version.
files.createDescription: Add a new file or folder inside the current directory.
files.renameDescription: Move this entry to a new name in the same directory.
files.deleteDescription: This removes the file or folder from the project. This action cannot be undone.
files.deleteTypePrompt: Type the path to confirm deletion.
